images.title: Kite Surfer (222295233).jpeg
images.description: 500px provided description: The Almanarre beach is a great spot to practice kite surfing. I decided to go catch some of them. Unfortunately I only had my 24-105mm. I wished I had a 70-200. Taken in Giens, Var; France. Summer 2015.
